meaning: n.英国货币,标准纯银adj.英币的,纯银制的,纯正的
examples: Sterling continues to gain ground against the dollar.
Those are sterling qualities to be admired in anyone.
You can be paid in pounds sterling or American dollars.
The strong sterling means British buyers are crossing the channel in increasing numbers, Continental brokers say.
And when sterling falls, as it has done, the cost of raw materials and overseas-manufactured components rises.
